C:\mingw64\bin\cmake.exe -E rm -f CMakeFiles\headsoccer.dir/objects.a
C:\msys64\ucrt64\bin\ar.exe qc CMakeFiles\headsoccer.dir/objects.a @CMakeFiles\headsoccer.dir\objects1.rsp
C:\msys64\ucrt64\bin\g++.exe -g -Wl,--whole-archive CMakeFiles\headsoccer.dir/objects.a -Wl,--no-whole-archive -o headsoccer.exe -Wl,--out-implib,libheadsoccer.dll.a -Wl,--major-image-version,0,--minor-image-version,0 @CMakeFiles\headsoccer.dir\linkLibs.rsp
